com.nexacro.java.xapi.data

Interface VariableDataConverter

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    DefaultVariableDataConverter

    public interface VariableDataConverter

    transform Variable data to other type data. Variable transform data using VariableDataConverter, and basically applied VariableDataConverter is DefaultVariableDataConverter.

    in order to change transformation method, realize VariableDataConverter, and summonVariable setDataConverter(VariableDataConverter), to enable VariableDataConverter user application.

    below is the relation between Variable method and internally summoned VariableDataConverter method. The caveat is, when setting Variable data, if transformation status,(isConvertingToDataType) is "false", summoning Variable set(value)will not transform data but save original data without modification. i.e. VariableDataConverter transformation method cannot be summoned.

    Variable method VariableDataConverter method
    getObject() toObject(Variable, Object)
    getString() toString(Variable, Object, int, String)
    getInt() toInt(Variable, Object)
    getBoolean() toBoolean(Variable, Object)
    getLong() toLong(Variable, Object)
    getFloat() toFloat(Variable, Object)
    getDouble() toDouble(Variable, Object)
    getBigDecimal() toBigDecimal(Variable, Object)
    getDateTime() toDateTime(Variable, Object)
    getBlob() toBlob(Variable, Object, String)
    set(Object) convert(Variable, Object, int)
    set(String) convert(Variable, String, int, String)
    set(int) convert(Variable, int, int)
    set(boolean) convert(Variable, boolean, int)
    set(long) convert(Variable, long, int)
    set(float) convert(Variable, float, int)
    set(double) convert(Variable, double, int)
    set(BigDecimal) convert(Variable, BigDecimal, int)
    set(Date) convert(Variable, Date, int)
    set(byte[]) convert(Variable, byte[], int, String)
    Author:
    Choi, Jongkwan

      Transform Object type data to byte array type.

      Transform Object type data to boolean type.

      Transform Object type data to date and time including Date type.
